title: Node Collection - Sorting Case-Insensitive
user_story:
As an API consumer\
When I request a sorted node collection\
I want the sorting algorithm to ignore the case\
So I don't receive two groups of items (1x sorted uppercase, 1x sorted lowercase)
description:
* this extends the existing feature <https://dennis-gerike.atlassian.net/browse/MCA-373> 
* current issue: the magazine list is accidentally split into two
  * the first group has all magazines that start with an uppercase letter (e.g. “Top Gear”)
  * the second group has all magazines that start with a lowercase letter (e.g. “sport auto”)
  * this makes it hard for the user to find the node they are looking for
  * and it might let the user believe that a node is missing
* when sorting the nodes the case of the resp. property has to be ignored
  * e.g. “Auto” and “auto” have the same rank
* this change request does not invalidate any of the previous requirements
